subject: [PATCH v3 8/8] io_uring/cmd: set selected buffer index in __io_uring_cmd_done()

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch sets the selected buffer index in the completion queue entry for io_uring commands that select a buffer, allowing userspace to determine which buffer contains the data. The change is necessary to provide this information to userspace and was implemented by adding a new flag IORING_CQE_F_BUFFER and encoding the buffer index in the completion queue entry.
